name: authwrite
description: Zero-dependency authorization library with idiomatic framework adapters and pluggable observers

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/express && npm run build -w packages/fastify && npm run build -w packages/nextjs && npm run build -w packages/hono && npm run build -w packages/observer-pg && npm run build -w packages/observer-redis && npm run build -w packages/observer-otel && npm run build -w packages/loader-db && npm run build -w packages/loader-yaml && npm run build -w packages/testing && npm run build -w packages/hateoas && npm run build -w packages/devtools
scripts.clean: npm run clean -ws --if-present && rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo
scripts.prepublish:check: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublish:check && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/core && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/express && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/fastify && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/nextjs && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/hono && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/observer-pg && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/observer-redis && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/observer-otel && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/loader-db && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/loader-yaml && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/testing && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/hateoas
scripts.publish:all: npm run prepublish:check && npm publish -w packages/core && npm publish -w packages/express && npm publish -w packages/fastify && npm publish -w packages/nextjs && npm publish -w packages/hono && npm publish -w packages/observer-pg && npm publish -w packages/observer-redis && npm publish -w packages/observer-otel && npm publish -w packages/loader-db && npm publish -w packages/loader-yaml && npm publish -w packages/testing && npm publish -w packages/hateoas
